action.reasoning: Observation: seed-42 ViT training completed successfully and the validation ensemble benchmark now shows multiple 3-4 checkpoint ViT ensembles reaching 0.9424 validation accuracy, above the prior two-checkpoint ensemble validation accuracy of 0.9416 that gave the current best hidden score 0.9381. Analysis: this is an inference-only change with low risk; a three-model ensemble using a known 0.9424 validation combo adds diversity from the new seed while keeping inference cost and model size well within limits. Decision: update predict.py to use the validation-selected ViT ensemble checkpoints_vit_j8/best.pt + checkpoints_vit_seed42/best.pt + checkpoints_vit/last.pt when available, then submit for evaluation.
